title: Foundey
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
For SaaS & AI Companies
Your In-house UX AI Product Designer
Foundey embeds senior product thinking + design execution. So you stop being the only one carrying the UX calls.
Foundey embeds senior product thinking + design execution. So you stop being the only one carrying the UX calls.
Book a 20-min call
Book a 20-min call
Your in-house product team
AI gave you speed. UX didn't follow.
Moving fast alone doesn’t move the product forward. The right UX decisions do.
Moving fast alone doesn’t move the product forward. The right UX decisions do.
Discover Our Approach
Discover Our Approach
Embedded in your team
We execute inside your team, day to day, as your dedicated designer. Owning execution from decision to shipped product.
Product Thinking + Validation
We remove the work and cognitive load, while bringing context and judgment to help decide and validate.
Inside your workflow
We work where decisions happen in real-time. No handoff. No delays.
Built to adapt
Priorities change. Context is thin.
We adjust to you, not the other way around.
Outcome-driven
More output doesn’t mean better outcomes.
Better decisions do.
Full-Stack Solution
Everything you need for product development.
Product Designer
From discovery to delivery,
we design flows that move users forward.
Product Designer
From discovery to delivery,
we design flows that move users forward.
Software Engineer
Clean code. Fast systems. Seamless execution.
Software Engineer
Clean code. Fast systems. Seamless execution.
Visual Designer
Across LinkedIn, AI search and inbound channels, design is the key driver.
Web Designer
Need a website refresh?
We’ll design, build, and launch it in days.
Motion Designer
We add motion that guides attention and strengthens storytelling.
Brand Designer
From visual identity to voice, we craft brands that connect.
Why product design matters now
AI-native product team saves time and boosts revenue.
Results in hours, not months
When speed matters, your first design results arrive the same day.
On-demand E2E support
Easily shift between engineering and different design specialists as your needs change.
Scale without hiring anyone
Engage with 2 or more resources, no equity, no benefits, no PEO required.
Not every designer is built for startup needs
Not every designer
is built for startup speed
Startups face three hiring barriers: fit, cost, and timing.
Typical Designers
Passive with limited ownership (Agency, Freelancer)
Too focused on UI not on UX
Built for corporate pace, not real-time priorities.
Unable to handle multiple tasks simultaneously
Doesn't utilize AI correctly
Startup Designers
In-house gives complete control, operating like an owner
Prioritizes user experience over surface-level visuals
Comfortable operating in undefined environments
Sales oriented rather than rigidly tied to design principles
Use AI to fine tune and customize
How our process works
Find the right product designer in four steps
Step 1: Free Consultation (30 min)
We analyze your sales process and product challenges.
Step 1: Free Consultation (30 min)
We analyze your sales process and product challenges.
Step 2: Working Session (1 Hour)
We align on the best design approach and map out a one-month trial.
Step 2: Working Session (1 Hour)
We align on the best design approach and map out a one-month trial.
Step 3: Design Sprint (1 month Trial)
We embed as your in-house designer for a one-month sprint.
Step 3: Design Sprint (1 month Trial)
We embed as your in-house designer for a one-month sprint.
Step 4: Optimization (Long Term)
We validate, iterate, and optimize for a fast, reliable, sales-driven product.
Step 4: Optimization (Long Term)
We validate, iterate, and optimize for a fast, reliable, sales-driven product.
87% of Our Clients Successfully Raised Series A
87% of Our Clients Successfully
Raised Series A
Drove $1.3B+ in startup value and $150M+ in revenue.
Foundey, our go-to design partner at Traycer. From day one, they've felt like a seamless extension of our own team. Truly taking the time to understand our goals and consistently delivering fresh, impactful designs.
Tanveer
CEO @ Traycer
I’ve worked with plenty of designers, and Foundey stands out. I now consider them an extension of the Demand IQ team. Their work is incredibly high-quality and cost-effective.
Austin
CEO @ DemandIQ
Thorough, creative and diligent.
They are impressive at understanding requirements, doing research and producing functional designs.
Will not regret, give them a try.
Ankur
CEO at @ Sero AI (YCS23)
From the very start, the team brought the speed, quality, and attention to detail we needed to hit our aggressive development timelines—without compromising on delivering a user experience that stands out in our industry.
Elif Kinli
CTO @ Double Nickel
Foundey Team went above and beyond to help us add a design system, and make our product more professional. Great team, great output and very reliable.
Shiv
CEO @ Athina (YC W23)
From the first day we kicked off, Foundey team transformed our mobile app and guided us through envisioning major web platform features. Their design prowess is unmatched!
#DesignMasters
Stephen
CEO @ Capabuild
Trusted by leading startups.

Why 87% of Foundey's Clients Raise Series A (Design's Role in Fundraising)
Common questions
Frequently Asked Questions
How long does a typical project take?
MVP design sprints: 2-4 weeks. Full product redesigns: 6-12 weeks. Embedded partnerships: ongoing. We move at startup speed without sacrificing quality.
Do you work with early-stage/pre-funded startups?
We work with startups from seed to Series A. If you're pre-seed or bootstrapped, we recommend starting with a design jam session to identify quick wins before a full engagement.
What's the difference between you and other design agencies?
We only work with startups. We speak your language (CAC, PMF, runway). We embed with your team instead of just handing off files. And we focus on business outcomes, not design awards.
Can I meet the designer and see their portfolio before starting?
Absolutely. During your trial, you'll meet your designer, ask questions, and see their portfolio of work at Foundey. That said, we handle the matching process, it's our job to pair you with the right designer for your specific project and challenges. We've been doing this long enough to get it right.
How do embedded design partnerships work?
You get a dedicated lead designer and a designer who joins your team calls, iterates based on feedback, and works ongoing. Monthly retainer with flexible scope. Think fractional design team.
What time zone does the designer work in?
Our designers are flexible and can align with your preferred time zone. We ensure smooth collaboration, whether you're in the US, Europe, or elsewhere.

Common questions
Frequently Asked Questions
How long does a typical project take?
MVP design sprints: 2-4 weeks. Full product redesigns: 6-12 weeks. Embedded partnerships: ongoing. We move at startup speed without sacrificing quality.
Do you work with early-stage/pre-funded startups?
We work with startups from seed to Series A. If you're pre-seed or bootstrapped, we recommend starting with a design jam session to identify quick wins before a full engagement.
What's the difference between you and other design agencies?
We only work with startups. We speak your language (CAC, PMF, runway). We embed with your team instead of just handing off files. And we focus on business outcomes, not design awards.
Can I meet the designer and see their portfolio before starting?
Absolutely. During your trial, you'll meet your designer, ask questions, and see their portfolio of work at Foundey. That said, we handle the matching process, it's our job to pair you with the right designer for your specific project and challenges. We've been doing this long enough to get it right.
How do embedded design partnerships work?
You get a dedicated lead designer and a designer who joins your team calls, iterates based on feedback, and works ongoing. Monthly retainer with flexible scope. Think fractional design team.
What time zone does the designer work in?
Our designers are flexible and can align with your preferred time zone. We ensure smooth collaboration, whether you're in the US, Europe, or elsewhere.

## full_text

For SaaS & AI Companies
Your In-house UX AI Product Designer
Foundey embeds senior product thinking + design execution. So you stop being the only one carrying the UX calls.
Foundey embeds senior product thinking + design execution. So you stop being the only one carrying the UX calls.
Book a 20-min call
Book a 20-min call
Your in-house product team
AI gave you speed. UX didn't follow.
Moving fast alone doesn’t move the product forward. The right UX decisions do.
Moving fast alone doesn’t move the product forward. The right UX decisions do.
Discover Our Approach
Discover Our Approach
Embedded in your team
We execute inside your team, day to day, as your dedicated designer. Owning execution from decision to shipped product.
Product Thinking + Validation
We remove the work and cognitive load, while bringing context and judgment to help decide and validate.
Inside your workflow
We work where decisions happen in real-time. No handoff. No delays.
Built to adapt
Priorities change. Context is thin.
We adjust to you, not the other way around.
Outcome-driven
More output doesn’t mean better outcomes.
Better decisions do.
Full-Stack Solution
Everything you need for product development.
Product Designer
From discovery to delivery,
we design flows that move users forward.
Product Designer
From discovery to delivery,
we design flows that move users forward.
Software Engineer
Clean code. Fast systems. Seamless execution.
Software Engineer
Clean code. Fast systems. Seamless execution.
Visual Designer
Across LinkedIn, AI search and inbound channels, design is the key driver.
Web Designer
Need a website refresh?
We’ll design, build, and launch it in days.
Motion Designer
We add motion that guides attention and strengthens storytelling.
Brand Designer
From visual identity to voice, we craft brands that connect.
Why product design matters now
AI-native product team saves time and boosts revenue.
Results in hours, not months
When speed matters, your first design results arrive the same day.
On-demand E2E support
Easily shift between engineering and different design specialists as your needs change.
Scale without hiring anyone
Engage with 2 or more resources, no equity, no benefits, no PEO required.
Not every designer is built for startup needs
Not every designer
is built for startup speed
Startups face three hiring barriers: fit, cost, and timing.
Typical Designers
Passive with limited ownership (Agency, Freelancer)
Too focused on UI not on UX
Built for corporate pace, not real-time priorities.
Unable to handle multiple tasks simultaneously
Doesn't utilize AI correctly
Startup Designers
In-house gives complete control, operating like an owner
Prioritizes user experience over surface-level visuals
Comfortable operating in undefined environments
Sales oriented rather than rigidly tied to design principles
Use AI to fine tune and customize
How our process works
Find the right product designer in four steps
Step 1: Free Consultation (30 min)
We analyze your sales process and product challenges.
Step 1: Free Consultation (30 min)
We analyze your sales process and product challenges.
Step 2: Working Session (1 Hour)
We align on the best design approach and map out a one-month trial.
Step 2: Working Session (1 Hour)
We align on the best design approach and map out a one-month trial.
Step 3: Design Sprint (1 month Trial)
We embed as your in-house designer for a one-month sprint.
Step 3: Design Sprint (1 month Trial)
We embed as your in-house designer for a one-month sprint.
Step 4: Optimization (Long Term)
We validate, iterate, and optimize for a fast, reliable, sales-driven product.
